---
title: "Tennis_Point_Streaks_Part_3"
author: "Muhammed Altindal"
date: "2026-04-16"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)

# =========================================================
# 0) LOAD DATA
# =========================================================
points_clean <- readRDS("points_clean.rds")

# Tableau'da seçenek olarak kullanılacak parametre grid'i
min_length_values <- 3:10
allowed_losses_values <- 0:3

param_grid <- expand_grid(
  min_length = min_length_values,
  allowed_losses = allowed_losses_values
)

# =========================================================
# 1) RELAXED STREAK FUNCTION
# =========================================================
find_relaxed_streaks_prof <- function(x, min_length = 8, allowed_losses = 1) {
  
  n <- length(x)
  
  results <- data.frame(
    streak_start_point = integer(),
    streak_end_point = integer(),
    points_won_in_streak = integer(),
    points_lost_in_streak = integer()
  )
  
  start_idx <- 1
  
  while (start_idx <= n) {
    
    # NEW RULE:
    # The streak must start with a point won by the streaking player.
    if (x[start_idx] != 1) {
      start_idx <- start_idx + 1
      next
    }
    
    wins <- 0
    losses <- 0
    
    best_end <- NA
    best_wins <- NA
    best_losses <- NA
    
    for (end_idx in start_idx:n) {
      if (x[end_idx] == 1) {
        wins <- wins + 1
      } else {
        losses <- losses + 1
      }
      
      if (losses > allowed_losses) break
      
      if (wins >= min_length) {
        best_end <- end_idx
        best_wins <- wins
        best_losses <- losses
      }
    }
    
    if (is.na(best_end)) {
      start_idx <- start_idx + 1
    } else {
      results <- rbind(
        results,
        data.frame(
          streak_start_point = start_idx,
          streak_end_point = best_end,
          points_won_in_streak = best_wins,
          points_lost_in_streak = best_losses
        )
      )
      
      segment <- x[start_idx:best_end]
      first_loss_pos <- which(segment == 0)[1]
      
      if (is.na(first_loss_pos)) {
        start_idx <- best_end + 1
      } else {
        start_idx <- start_idx + first_loss_pos
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (nrow(results) == 0) {
    return(tibble())
  }
  
  as_tibble(results) %>%
    mutate(
      streak_length = streak_end_point - streak_start_point + 1
    )
}
# =========================================================
# 2) BUILD MATCH-LEVEL POINT SEQUENCE
#    This is the main table behind the black line / points
# =========================================================
build_match_seq <- function(match_df) {
  
  match_df <- match_df %>%
    arrange(SetNo, GameNo, PointNumber) %>%
    mutate(point_index = row_number())
  
  p1_name <- first(match_df$P1_name)
  p2_name <- first(match_df$P2_name)
  
  match_seq <- match_df %>%
    mutate(
      winner_y = case_when(
        PointWinnerName == p1_name ~ 1.00,
        PointWinnerName == p2_name ~ 0.94,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      )
    ) %>%
    group_by(SetNo) %>%
    mutate(
      point_in_set = row_number()
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      run_id = cumsum(row_number() == 1 | PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName))
    ) %>%
    group_by(run_id) %>%
    mutate(
      run_length = n()
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      prev_run_length = lag(run_length),
      streak_break = ifelse(
        row_number() == 1,
        FALSE,
        PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName) & prev_run_length >= 2
      ),
      one_point_interruption = ifelse(
        row_number() %in% c(1, n()),
        FALSE,
        lag(PointWinnerName) == lead(PointWinnerName) &
          PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName) &
          prev_run_length >= 2
      )
    ) %>%
    group_by(SetNo) %>%
    arrange(point_in_set, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(
      next_x = lead(point_in_set),
      next_y = lead(winner_y)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  match_seq
}

# =========================================================
# 3) GAME SUMMARY
#    For server shading in Tableau
# =========================================================
build_game_summary <- function(match_seq) {
  match_seq %>%
    group_by(match_id, SetNo, GameNo) %>%
    summarise(
      game_start = min(point_in_set),
      game_end = max(point_in_set),
      server_name = first(PointServerName),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

# =========================================================
# 4) BUILD STREAK TABLES FOR ONE PLAYER IN ONE MATCH
# =========================================================
build_player_streak_outputs <- function(match_seq, player_name, param_grid) {
  
  player_seq <- match_seq %>%
    mutate(
      player_name = player_name,
      player_win = ifelse(PointWinnerName == player_name, 1L, 0L)
    )
  
  # -------------------------------
  # A) streak summary table
  # -------------------------------
  streaks_table <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(param_grid)), function(i) {
    
    min_len_i <- param_grid$min_length[i]
    allowed_i <- param_grid$allowed_losses[i]
    
    basic_streaks <- find_relaxed_streaks_prof(
      x = player_seq$player_win,
      min_length = min_len_i,
      allowed_losses = allowed_i
    )
    
    if (nrow(basic_streaks) == 0) {
      return(tibble())
    }
    
    basic_streaks %>%
      mutate(
        match_id = first(player_seq$match_id),
        player_name = player_name,
        min_length = min_len_i,
        allowed_losses = allowed_i,
        streak_id = row_number(),
        duration_points = streak_end_point - streak_start_point + 1
      )
  })
  
  if (nrow(streaks_table) == 0) {
    return(list(
      streaks_table = tibble(),
      streak_overlay_table = tibble(),
      markers_table = tibble()
    ))
  }
  
  start_info <- player_seq %>%
    select(
      point_index,
      start_SetNo = SetNo,
      start_GameNo = GameNo,
      start_point_in_set = point_in_set
    )
  
  end_info <- player_seq %>%
    select(
      point_index,
      end_SetNo = SetNo,
      end_GameNo = GameNo,
      end_point_in_set = point_in_set
    )
  
  streaks_table <- streaks_table %>%
    left_join(start_info, by = c("streak_start_point" = "point_index")) %>%
    left_join(end_info, by = c("streak_end_point" = "point_index")) %>%
    select(
      match_id,
      player_name,
      min_length,
      allowed_losses,
      streak_id,
      streak_start_point,
      streak_end_point,
      start_SetNo,
      start_GameNo,
      start_point_in_set,
      end_SetNo,
      end_GameNo,
      end_point_in_set,
      points_won_in_streak,
      points_lost_in_streak,
      streak_length,
      duration_points
    )
  
  # -------------------------------
  # B) point-level overlay table
  # -------------------------------
  streak_overlay_table <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(streaks_table)), function(i) {
    
    start_pt <- streaks_table$streak_start_point[i]
    end_pt   <- streaks_table$streak_end_point[i]
    
    player_seq %>%
      filter(point_index >= start_pt, point_index <= end_pt) %>%
      arrange(point_index) %>%
      transmute(
        match_id,
        player_name = player_name,
        min_length = streaks_table$min_length[i],
        allowed_losses = streaks_table$allowed_losses[i],
        streak_id = streaks_table$streak_id[i],
        SetNo,
        GameNo,
        point_index,
        point_in_set,
        PointWinnerName,
        PointServerName,
        winner_y
      )
  })
  
  # -------------------------------
  # C) markers table
  # -------------------------------
  start_markers <- streaks_table %>%
    left_join(
      player_seq %>% select(point_index, SetNo, point_in_set, winner_y),
      by = c("streak_start_point" = "point_index")
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      match_id,
      player_name,
      min_length,
      allowed_losses,
      streak_id,
      SetNo,
      point_index = streak_start_point,
      point_in_set,
      marker_type = "streak_start",
      marker_y = winner_y
    )
  
  end_markers <- streaks_table %>%
    left_join(
      player_seq %>% select(point_index, SetNo, point_in_set, winner_y),
      by = c("streak_end_point" = "point_index")
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      match_id,
      player_name,
      min_length,
      allowed_losses,
      streak_id,
      SetNo,
      point_index = streak_end_point,
      point_in_set,
      marker_type = "streak_end",
      marker_y = winner_y
    )
  
  interruption_markers <- player_seq %>%
    filter(one_point_interruption, PointWinnerName == player_name) %>%
    transmute(
      match_id,
      player_name,
      min_length = NA_integer_,
      allowed_losses = NA_integer_,
      streak_id = NA_integer_,
      SetNo,
      point_index,
      point_in_set,
      marker_type = "one_point_interruption",
      marker_y = winner_y
    )
  
  break_markers <- player_seq %>%
    filter(streak_break, PointWinnerName == player_name) %>%
    transmute(
      match_id,
      player_name,
      min_length = NA_integer_,
      allowed_losses = NA_integer_,
      streak_id = NA_integer_,
      SetNo,
      point_index,
      point_in_set,
      marker_type = "streak_break",
      marker_y = winner_y
    )
  
  markers_table <- bind_rows(
    start_markers,
    end_markers,
    interruption_markers,
    break_markers
  ) %>%
    arrange(match_id, player_name, SetNo, point_index, marker_type)
  
  list(
    streaks_table = streaks_table,
    streak_overlay_table = streak_overlay_table,
    markers_table = markers_table
  )
}

# =========================================================
# 5) LOOP OVER MATCHES
#    Important: each match is processed separately
# =========================================================
all_match_ids <- points_clean %>%
  distinct(match_id) %>%
  pull(match_id)

points_out <- list()
games_out <- list()
streaks_out <- list()
overlay_out <- list()
markers_out <- list()

for (mid in all_match_ids) {
  
  message("Processing match: ", mid)
  
  match_raw <- points_clean %>%
    filter(match_id == mid) %>%
    arrange(SetNo, GameNo, PointNumber)
  
  if (nrow(match_raw) == 0) next
  
  match_seq <- build_match_seq(match_raw)
  
  # -------------------------------------------------
  # main points table (for black line + black points)
  # -------------------------------------------------
  points_table_i <- match_seq %>%
    transmute(
    match_id,
    SetNo,
    GameNo,
    point_index,
    point_in_set,
    P1Score,
    P2Score,
    point_score = paste0(P1Score, "-", P2Score),
    P1_name,
    P2_name,
    PointWinnerName,
    PointServerName,
    winner_y,
    run_id,
    run_length,
    prev_run_length,
    streak_break,
    one_point_interruption,
    next_x,
    next_y
  )
  
  points_out[[mid]] <- points_table_i
  
  # -------------------------------------------------
  # game shading table
  # -------------------------------------------------
  games_out[[mid]] <- build_game_summary(match_seq)
  
  # -------------------------------------------------
  # player streak tables
  # -------------------------------------------------
  p1_name <- first(match_seq$P1_name)
  p2_name <- first(match_seq$P2_name)
  
  player_names <- c(p1_name, p2_name)
  
  for (pl in player_names) {
    out <- build_player_streak_outputs(
      match_seq = match_seq,
      player_name = pl,
      param_grid = param_grid
    )
    
    streaks_out[[paste(mid, pl, "streaks", sep = "__")]] <- out$streaks_table
    overlay_out[[paste(mid, pl, "overlay", sep = "__")]] <- out$streak_overlay_table
    markers_out[[paste(mid, pl, "markers", sep = "__")]] <- out$markers_table
  }
}

# =========================================================
# 6) FINAL TABLES
# =========================================================
points_tableau <- bind_rows(points_out)
games_tableau <- bind_rows(games_out)
streaks_tableau <- bind_rows(streaks_out)
streak_overlay_tableau <- bind_rows(overlay_out)
markers_tableau <- bind_rows(markers_out)

# =========================================================
# 7) WRITE CSV FILES
# =========================================================
write_csv(points_tableau, "points_tableau.csv")
write_csv(games_tableau, "games_tableau.csv")
write_csv(streaks_tableau, "streaks_tableau.csv")
write_csv(streak_overlay_tableau, "streak_overlay_tableau.csv")
write_csv(markers_tableau, "markers_tableau.csv")

# =========================================================
# 8) QUICK CHECKS
#    These are only checks, not final summary tables
# =========================================================
cat("\nCreated CSV files:\n")
cat("- points_tableau.csv\n")
cat("- games_tableau.csv\n")
cat("- streaks_tableau.csv\n")
cat("- streak_overlay_tableau.csv\n")
cat("- markers_tableau.csv\n")

cat("\nRow counts:\n")
cat("points_tableau:", nrow(points_tableau), "\n")
cat("games_tableau:", nrow(games_tableau), "\n")
cat("streaks_tableau:", nrow(streaks_tableau), "\n")
cat("streak_overlay_tableau:", nrow(streak_overlay_tableau), "\n")
cat("markers_tableau:", nrow(markers_tableau), "\n")

# Example single-match check:
# streaks_tableau %>%
#   filter(match_id == "2011-frenchopen-1403",
#          player_name == "Andy Murray",
#          min_length == 8,
#          allowed_losses == 1)
```
```{r}
streaks_tableau %>%
  filter(match_id == "2011-frenchopen-1403",
         player_name == "Andy Murray",
         min_length == 8,
         allowed_losses == 1)
```
